calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-13-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Mary Coughlin, Esq. for Petitioner Nicle Hansen also present, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Nicole Riza.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-11-2003 Off Calendar
